"[2] Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1185 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +17077383597. The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.2 mins"
